content.problemStatement:
You're given an array A=[A1,A2,…,AN]A = [A_1, A_2, \ldots, A_N]A=[A1​,A2​,…,AN​] containing NNN integers.

You also have an integer KKK.

You can perform the following operation on this array:


Choose indices iii and jjj such that ∣i−j∣≥K|i - j| \geq K∣i−j∣≥K, and swap AiA_iAi​ and AjA_jAj​.

That is, you can swap the values of two indices that are at a distance of at least KKK from each other.
Find the lexicographically **smallest** array that can be reached, if you perform the above operation several (possibly, zero) times.

**Note:** For two arrays XXX and YYY of the same length, XXX is said to be lexicographically smaller than YYY if there exists an index iii (1≤i≤N1 \leq i \leq N1≤i≤N) such that:


X1=Y1,X2=Y2,…,Xi−1=Yi−1X_1 = Y_1, X_2 = Y_2, \ldots, X_{i-1} = Y_{i-1}X1​=Y1​,X2​=Y2​,…,Xi−1​=Yi−1​; and
Xi<YiX_i \lt Y_iXi​<Yi​

Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of two lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and KKK.
The next line contains NNN space-separated numbers, the values A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.




Output Format

For each test case, print on a new line NNN space-separated integers — the lexicographically smallest array possible after applying the above operation several times.
constraints: The sum of NNN across all tests won't exceed 10610^6106.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: Initially, we have A=[3,2,1]A = [3, 2, 1]A=[3,2,1].
Choose i=1i = 1i=1 and j=3j = 3j=3, which is valid because ∣1−3∣=2≥K=2|1-3| = 2 \geq K = 2∣1−3∣=2≥K=2.
Swapping A1A_1A1​ and A3A_3A3​, we have the array [1,2,3][1, 2, 3][1,2,3], which is the best we can do.
Test case 222: A=[3,2,4,1]A = [3, 2, 4, 1]A=[3,2,4,1] and K=3K = 3K=3 here.
The only possible swap is i=1i = 1i=1 and j=4j = 4j=4; the other two elements can't be moved.
Performing this swap gives us A=[1,2,4,3]A = [1, 2, 4, 3]A=[1,2,4,3], which is the best we can do.
